name: Cathy's Beef 'n Potato Casserole
recipeIngredient: 8 Yellow wax peppers, seeded, halved lengthwise
26 ounces shredded potatoes, fresh or frozen
1 can cream of chicken soup, condensed
1/2 cup shredded cheddar cheese, up to 1 cup
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Mix ground beef, eggs, Worcestershire sauce, onion, and garlic together in a large bowl.
3. Place the ground beef mixture in a deep (at least 4-inch) pan measuring at least 9 x 13 inches.
4. Top the ground beef with a single layer of peppers. Mix peas and corn together and spread over the peppers.
5. Top with a layer of shredded potatoes.
6. Mix remaining ingredients (cream of chicken soup, tomato soup, water, hot red pepper sauce, salt, and cheddar cheese) together in another bowl.
7. Pour the mixture evenly over the potatoes.
8. Bake the casserole for 1 hour and 15 minutes, or until the meat is cooked through.
9. Remove from oven and top with cheese.
10. Cut into 8 portions and serve.
